summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-centered (97% extrovert!) Organizational Development professional who thrives on solving problems through {data|data analysis}, developing {prog|programs} grounded in evidence, and collaborating with {cross|stakeholders} for sustainable change. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve employee experience—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.
